reasoning: The document contains a single MAJOR fidelity defect due to bulleted lists being converted incorrectly as plain text strings within table cells, leading to a loss of list semantics. There is also a minor programmatic observation regarding table header markup. According to the count-based routing thresholds, 1 major defect requires HUMAN_REVIEW.

concerns.analysis: The source document contains several bulleted lists within the agenda topics (e.g., under 'Project Finance Update' and 'Project Status'). In the output JSON, these list items are extracted as plain text strings containing literal bullet characters ('•') and newline characters inside the table cells, rather than being converted into proper list structures. This causes a loss of list semantics for screen readers.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
Project Finance Update
• Cost share payments received.
• Funds expended.
concerns.output_quote: "Project Finance Update\n• Cost share payments received.\n• Funds expended."

concerns.description: Table header markup issues: 1 table(s) have time values in <th> cells: "2:00-2:10"
concerns.analysis: data_in_th_time=1, no_th_tables=0. Minor semantic markup issues: tables lack <th> elements or use time values as headers. These affect screen reader context but are less severe than data misrepresentation.

action_items: Review and correct list markup within table cells to ensure proper list semantics.
Verify table headers and adjust if time values shouldn't be <th> elements.
